title: ComfyUI Tutorial Series Ep 47: Make Free AI Music with ACE-Step V1
description:
Discover how to generate free AI music inside ComfyUI with the new ACE-Step V1 model!
In this episode, I’ll guide you step-by-step through installing the model, loading the workflow, generating instrumental tracks, and even adding lyrics. Whether you want ambient loops, medieval soundscapes, or hip-hop beats—this FREE ComfyUI music model has you covered.

✅ How to update ComfyUI for music support
✅ Import workflows: text-to-music, lyrics, and remixing
✅ Pro tips for better tags, CFG settings, and denoise tweaks
✅ How to use ChatGPT to generate tags & lyrics
✅ Exporting and testing music in real-time (FLAC audio)

Get the workflows and instructions from discord for free
https://discord.gg/gggpkVgBf3

Check Other Episodes
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL-pohOSaL8P9kLZP8tQ1K1QWdZEgwiBM0

Unlock exclusive perks by joining our channel:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCmMbwA-s3GZDKVzGZ-kPwaQ/join

Download the model from here:
https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ACE-Step_ComfyUI_repack
